expectations.evidence: Output lists all 9 coding-rules documents read: typescript.md, naming.md, code-style.md, folder-structure.md, comments.md, git.md, testing.md, package-manager.md, completion.md with key rules extracted from each.

expectations.text: Detects framework or identifies Base TypeScript
expectations.evidence: Step 2 states: 'package.json 파일이 프로젝트 루트에 존재하지 않음' and 'Base TypeScript 프레임워크로 분류 (프레임워크 시그널 없음)'.

expectations.text: Maps coding rules to ESLint rules
expectations.evidence: Step 4 Group 1 contains a detailed mapping table: @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any from typescript.md, @typescript-eslint/consistent-type-definitions from typescript.md, no-restricted-syntax for FunctionDeclaration from code-style.md, simple-import-sort from folder-structure.md, jsdoc/require-jsdoc from comments.md, and more.

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions passed. The with_skill run produced a thorough 6-step simulation with detailed rule-to-ESLint mapping, framework detection, and guardrails compliance.
